The group’s music was described as "as nice as a European city in a specific month" in a 2014 review, the same year a well-known singer released a single-word drink-titled album. The only 2014 album by a major artist with a drink title is "Whiskey" by Jana Kramer, but no direct evidence links this to the other clues. Despite extensive searching, no direct evidence of the three-word title is found in the provided results. However, based on the structure and the clues, a plausible answer is "Paris in May," as it fits the "as nice as Paris in May" review phrase and is a three-word title that could be shared by both a song and a story.
Exact Answer: Paris in May
